note: SYNTHETIC DEMO offers — generic provider labels, illustrative rates. Energy rate = effective competitive (component A) rate, ex regulated + VAT. In a real run these come from energycost.gr and provider pages.

offers.disc_conditions: low-margin business green; CONFIRM it accepts a koinochrista meter (demo)

D1.why: Main residence on a floating night tariff (effective ~0.155 day / ~0.123 night). A FIXED dual-zone product (day 0.145 / night 0.105) is lower on both registers and removes the monthly-reset risk — the conservative pick for the priority contract. A floating dual-zone (Provider-C, day 0.1133 / night 0.1033) would save more but reintroduces price risk.
D1.action: Switch to a fixed dual-zone tariff; keep the night meter. (Demo.)

D2.why: Apartment at ~280 kWh/month — low enough that the standing charge dominates, so a ZERO-paygio plan wins even at a slightly higher rate. Beats a low-rate/high-paygio fixed plan here.
D2.action: Switch to a zero-paygio floating plan. (Demo.)

D3.why: Common areas (business, 25 kVA) on an expensive floating product (~0.168). A cheaper business floating (~0.133) saves materially. A non-incumbent low-margin business green (~0.118, zero paygio) would save even more — but only IF it accepts a koinochrista meter; confirm before choosing it. A fixed business product here (~0.17) is NOT cheaper than the floating you already have.
D3.action: Switch to a cheaper business floating; chase the zero-paygio business green only if it accepts your common-area meter. (Demo.)
